concerns.text: US-1 (Dataset Acquisition and Baseline Analysis) has FR-001 anchoring to it, but NO Success Criteria explicitly reference US-1. Per the lens requirement, every user story MUST have at least one SC backing it. Consider adding SC-006+ for baseline metrics validation (e.g., 'Baseline p-values are recorded for ≥10 datasets with valid numeric values').

US-2 (Systematic Cleaning Strategy Application) has FR-002, FR-003, FR-004 anchoring to it, but NO Success Criteria explicitly reference US-2. Per the lens requirement, every user story MUST have at least one SC backing it. Consider adding SC-006+ for cleaning application validation (e.g., 'Cleaning strategies are applied to all datasets with ≥5% missing values and outlier counts are recorded').
